observations.note: All 4 test suites correctly FAIL in RED phase. 33 total assertions: 10 pass (pre-conditions/backward-compat), 23 fail (new behavior).
Pure-logic module: config text replacement with no I/O, no DB, no network. Applied 95/5/0 test pyramid exception. All tests are unit-level grep assertions.
Dual-path parity tests (AC#2) verify both .claude/ and src/ files. Tests cover byte-for-byte comparison and block-level diff.
10 tests pass at baseline (pre-conditions, backward-compat checks for 'skip', file existence, block parity). All are expected to pass in both pre and post states.
